tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork10 (Particle Nebula)
tags.description: Adapted from the gravitational attractor particle system. Up to 380 particles influenced by up to 8 attractors using inverse-square gravity (distance clamped 5–30px). Attractors have a lifespan and respawn at new positions. A Perlin noise force adds organic drift. Trail history per particle. Color mapped to noise position (nebula), speed (fire), or position (ice).
